title: Zoom in - new text shows, old text disappears, X disappears
scenario: Zooming in on a big blue dot in the Poly Studio Mobile app causes old text (headline, swipe) and X button to disappear, replaced by new description text
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Locate a big blue dot (e.g., a device or feature indicator) on the screen.
Tap or zoom in on the big blue dot.
Observe the UI elements on the screen after zooming in.
expected: When zooming in on the big blue dot, the existing headline and swipe text should remain visible, and the X (close) button should persist. New description text may appear as additional information without replacing existing elements.
